metadata.significance: First revelation to Prophet Muhammad, emphasizes reading, knowledge, and creation

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ

translations.en_sahih: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
translations.en_yusufali: Proclaim! (or read!) in the name of thy Lord and Cherisher, Who created-
translations.ms_basmeih: Bacalah (wahai Muhammad) dengan nama Tuhanmu yang menciptakan (sekalian makhluk),

translations.en_sahih: Created man from a clinging substance.
translations.en_yusufali: Created man, out of a (mere) clot of congealed blood:
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menciptakan manusia dari sebuku darah beku;

translations.en_sahih: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
translations.en_yusufali: Proclaim! And thy Lord is Most Bountiful,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Bacalah, dan Tuhanmu Yang Maha Pemurah, -

translations.en_yusufali: He Who taught (the use of) the pen,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang mengajar manusia melalui pena dan tulisan, -

translations.en_sahih: Taught man that which he knew not.
translations.en_yusufali: Taught man that which he knew not.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia mengajarkan manusia apa yang tidak diketahuinya.

translations.en_yusufali: Nay, but man doth transgress all bounds,
translations.ms_basmeih: Ingatlah! Sesungguhnya jenis manusia tetap melampaui batas (yang sepatutnya atau yang sewajibnya),

translations.en_yusufali: In that he looketh upon himself as self-sufficient.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan sebab ia melihat dirinya sudah cukup apa yang dihajatinya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, to thy Lord is the return (of all).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatlah) sesungguhnya kepada Tuhanmu lah tempat kembali (untuk menerima balasan).

translations.en_sahih: Have you seen the one who forbids
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah engkau nampak (baiknya) orang yang melarang (dan menghalang) -

translations.en_yusufali: A votary when he (turns) to pray?
translations.ms_basmeih: Seorang hamba Allah apabila ia mengerjakan sembahyang?

translations.en_sahih: Have you seen if he is upon guidance
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou if he is on (the road of) Guidance?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah engkau nampak (buruknya) jika ia berada di atas jalan yang betul? -
Atau ia menyuruh orang bertaqwa (jangan melakukan syirik)?

translations.en_sahih: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou if he denies (Truth) and turns away?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah engkau nampak (terlepasnya dari azab) jika ia mendustakan (apa yang disampaikan oleh Nabi Muhammad kepadanya) serta ia berpaling ingkar?

translations.en_sahih: Does he not know that Allah sees?
translations.en_yusufali: Knoweth he not that Allah doth see?
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah ia mengetahui bahawa sesungguhnya Allah melihat (segala amal perbuatannya dan membalasnya)?

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla lain lam yantahi lanasfaAAan bialnnasiyati

translations.en_sahih: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
translations.en_yusufali: Let him beware! If he desist not, We will drag him by the forelock,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Jangan sekali-kali berlaku derhaka! Demi sesungguhnya jika ia tidak berhenti (dari perbuatannya yang buruk itu), nescaya Kami akan menyentap ubun-ubunnya (dan menyeretnya ke dalam neraka), -

translations.en_sahih: Then let him call his associates;
translations.en_yusufali: Then, let him call (for help) to his council (of comrades):
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian biarlah ia memanggil kumpulannya (untuk menyelamatkannya),

translations.en_sahih: We will call the angels of Hell.
translations.en_yusufali: We will call on the angels of punishment (to deal with him)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kami pula akan memanggil malaikat Zabaniyah (untuk menyeksanya)!

translations.en_sahih: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, heed him not: But bow down in adoration, and bring thyself the closer (to Allah)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Ingatlah! Janganlah engkau (wahai Muhammad) menurut kehendaknya, dan (sebaliknya) sujudlah dan dampingkanlah dirimu kepada Allah (dengan taat dan beramal soleh)!
